{{Quote|Welcome , people of the New Republic. I am Guldum Bemm, administrator of this colonial facility and your host.|[[Guldus Bemm]]|<ref name="BCB" />}}
'''Canyon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of arid mountains and plains in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]], near [[Moorja/Legends|Moorja]].

The planet was discovered accidentally by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] which collided with a nearby [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]]. The Empire ignored the planet, but the Star Destroyer's distress signal attracted [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] led by [[Guldus Bemm]], who set up a [[Canyon Mining Facility|mining colony]] on Canyon, exporting ores used in [[Starship/Legends|starship]] and electronics construction.<ref name="BCB" />

Shortly after the [[Invasion of Bakura]] the planet was the site of an attempt to trap [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] with promises of a cave bearing crystals that might be suitable for lightsabers. Instead of successfully trapping Skywalker, [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] was captured by [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisor]] [[Bregius Golthan]] as she had been on planet negotiating with planetary authorities for mineral rights for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The pirates continued to control the world well after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].
